The '''Golan Space Colony 3''', commonly known as '''Space Colony 3''', was manufactured by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]. Its predecessor was the [[Golan Space Colony 2]]. It was becoming quite popular throughout the galaxy around the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It traded extended repair facilities for improved living quarters and entertainment facilities.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
